inputs.text: Main thoda bukhar aur thakaan mehsoos kar raha hoon, aaj subah uthne ke baad se yeh sab shuru hua hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Mild fever and fatigue are common symptoms of viral infections

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Although less likely at this stage, bronchitis can also cause similar symptoms

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Tuberculosis is less likely given the acute onset and lack of other specific symptoms

inputs.text: Ab mujhe khansi bhi ho rahi hai, par yeh sookhi khansi hai, koi balgam nahi araaha

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: The onset of dry cough increases the likelihood of bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral infections can also cause cough, but the presence of dry cough leans more towards bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Still less likely without more specific symptoms like night sweats or significant weight loss

inputs.text: Raat ko mujhe bahut pasina aata hai, aur maine wazan bhi kam mehsoos kiya hai, khansi ab bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Night sweats, weight loss, and prolonged cough are cardinal signs of tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: While bronchitis can cause cough, the additional symptoms of night sweats and weight loss are not typical

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Pneumonia could be a consideration but the chronic nature of symptoms and specific symptoms like night sweats point more towards tuberculosis

inputs.text: Ab main bahut kamzor mehsoos kar raha hoon, aur kabhi-kabhi meri khaansi mein thoda khoon bhi nikalta hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: The presence of blood in sputum and severe weakness are confirmatory signs of advanced tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the progression of symptoms and specific signs of tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out as the clinical picture is more consistent with tuberculosis
